task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the home screen or main interface of the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app.

task_completion.description: Search for and select Crizotinib as the cancer drug
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Crizotinib' typed into the cancer drug search field or selected from a list of cancer drugs within the app.

task_completion.description: Search for and select Midazolam as the co-medication
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Midazolam' typed into the co-medication search field or selected from a list of co-medications within the app.

task_completion.description: View the interaction result between Crizotinib and Midazolam
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interaction result screen displaying both 'Crizotinib' and 'Midazolam', along with an interaction color (likely Red or Orange/Amber), category, and clinical note.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to create or edit the required output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor app or terminal editor open with the file path '/sdcard/tasks/crizotinib_midazolam_result.txt' visible in the title bar or command line.

task_completion.description: Document the required interaction findings in the text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text editor containing the documented results, specifically including the Cancer Drug (Crizotinib), Co-medication (Midazolam), Interaction Color, Category name, and a summary of the Clinical Note.

integrity.description: Agent used the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app to find the interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The interaction data must be seen on the actual iChart app interface in the screenshots, not retrieved via a web browser search (e.g., Google) or hallucinated from the agent's internal knowledge.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste a pre-generated answer without checking the app
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a clear chronological progression of opening the app, viewing the specific interaction, and then writing the file, rather than immediately writing the file at the start of the trajectory.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the file system to save the specific text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively editing the file '/sdcard/tasks/crizotinib_midazolam_result.txt' in a text editor or using valid terminal commands to write the specific output, rather than just echoing a generic success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Crizotinib is a real cancer drug and Midazolam is a real sedative. The expected interaction color in the Liverpool Cancer Drug Interactions system is likely RED (should not be coadministered) or ORANGE/AMBER (potential significant interaction). The output file must be located at /sdcard/tasks/crizotinib_midazolam_result.txt and must explicitly contain the words 'Crizotinib' and 'Midazolam'.
